channel.title: Head Tags plugin: validate, sanitize and escape tags
channel.description:
**--- [Feature Card](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Head-Tags-plugin-validate-sanitize-and-escape-tags-1055516627e3488baf8cf5268affbd2a)**
## Description We can't control the origin of the head tags, so it would be safer to sanitize and escape the tags ourselves.
## User Stories
> As a **head-tags PHP plugin user** > I want to **be protected from random bad input or malicious input in head tags** > so that **my Frontity site is never compromised**
## Solution Follow this guide from VIP: https://wpvip.com/documentation/vip-go/validating-sanitizing-and-escaping/

item.title: Head Tags plugin: validate, sanitize and escape tags
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
— Feature Card

Description

We can’t control the origin of the head tags, so it would be safer to sanitize and escape the tags ourselves.

User Stories

As a head-tags PHP plugin user
I want to be protected from random bad input or malicious input in head tags
so that my Frontity site is never compromised

Solution

Follow this guide from VIP: https://wpvip.com/documentation/vip-go/validating-sanitizing-and-escaping/

Read full topic
item.source: Head Tags plugin: validate, sanitize and escape tags
